sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO t (id, a) VALUES (1, 2)
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (id INTEGER, a INTEGER);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves INSERT IGNORE for SQLite; stock SQLite expects INSERT OR IGNORE.
oracle_sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO t (id, a) VALUES (1, 2)
sqlgrok_sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO t (id, a) VALUES (1, 2)
sqlite_stderr: Parse error near line 2: near "IGNORE": syntax error INSERT IGNORE INTO t (id, a) VALUES (1, 2); ^--- error here

sql: SELECT x FROM t LIMIT ALL
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves LIMIT ALL for SQLite; stock SQLite rejects ALL in LIMIT.
oracle_sql: SELECT x FROM t LIMIT ALL
sqlgrok_sql: SELECT x FROM t LIMIT ALL
sqlite_stderr: Parse error near line 2: near "ALL": syntax error SELECT x FROM t LIMIT ALL; ^--- error here

setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1), (2);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves OFFSET without LIMIT for SQLite; stock SQLite requires a LIMIT clause.
sqlite_stderr: Parse error near line 2: near "1": syntax error SELECT x FROM t OFFSET 1; ^--- error here

sql: SELECT x SIMILAR TO 'a%' FROM t
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (x TEXT); INSERT INTO t VALUES ('abc');
note: Python SQLGlot preserves SIMILAR TO for SQLite; stock SQLite does not implement the predicate.
oracle_sql: SELECT x SIMILAR TO 'a%' FROM t
sqlgrok_sql: SELECT x SIMILAR TO 'a%' FROM t
sqlite_stderr: Parse error near line 2: near "TO": syntax error SELECT x SIMILAR TO 'a%' FROM t; ^--- error here

sql: SELECT * FROM t, LATERAL (SELECT 1) AS x
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE t (a INTEGER); INSERT INTO t VALUES (1);
note: Python SQLGlot preserves LATERAL for SQLite; stock SQLite rejects this form.
oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM t, LATERAL (SELECT 1) AS x
sqlgrok_sql: SELECT * FROM t, LATERAL (SELECT 1) AS x
sqlite_stderr: Parse error near line 2: near "SELECT": syntax error SELECT * FROM t, LATERAL (SELECT 1) AS x; error here ---^

note: Python SQLGlot preserves LPAD for SQLite; stock SQLite does not provide LPAD by default.
